description: Cycle-005 S01 Gate-A method set (PROPOSED, not accepted). Per frozen-pool candidate: the route method_id, the DR-8 authored-input flags (fixed pre-contact at Gate A; injected verbatim by assemble.js into the 14-field census-input metadata), and the DR-7 per-measured-field method with its intended FR-A6 class and compatibility reference. Authored values are PROPOSALS for the operator's Gate-A decision (never operator acceptance). The one substantive authored call — EIA exogeneity (endogeneity_flag:true) — is flagged for the operator. No provider was contacted; measured n_observations/history_years/span values are NOT present here (they are acquired at S02 contact and classified at that time).
provenance: PRD FR-A6/UD-1/UD-2; SDD DR-2/DR-7/DR-8; candidate-pool.json (identity + cadence + EIA endogeneity_flag); research report 01 §4/§13 (planning-grade provider facts, docs-only, confirmed at contact)

authored_inputs.exogeneity_judgment: River stage/discharge is a physical hydrological measurement exogenous to any market, price, or betting signal.

authored_sources.authority_published: USGS is a federal scientific authority (candidate-pool rank 1)
authored_sources.machine_readable: NWIS site service returns machine-readable RDB (routes.js usgs-nwis-site-metadata)
authored_sources.cadence: candidate-pool.json rank 1 cadence descriptor (transcribed authored input; not a gate input)
authored_sources.exogeneity_judgment: authored judgment; physical measurement, no reflexivity flagged

history_years.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: (end_ms - begin_ms)/YEAR_MS, YEAR_MS=365.25d — conservative for the >=3y gate; operator acceptance required (UD-1)

span.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: site-catalog begin_date/end_date period of record

n_observations.compatibility_ref: DR-7: no documented aggregate count surface; cadence x span is an UPPER (inflating) estimate that fails the conservative-bound criterion; no availability-floor constant exists in authority; class (ii) empty -> candidate n-unresolved (SS 9.1 class 3) absent an operator-accepted demonstrable method (UD-1)

authored_inputs.exogeneity_judgment: Coastal water level is a physical oceanographic measurement exogenous to any market or betting signal.

authored_sources.authority_published: NOAA CO-OPS is a federal scientific authority (candidate-pool rank 2)
authored_sources.machine_readable: CO-OPS Metadata API returns machine-readable JSON (routes.js noaa-coops-station-metadata)
authored_sources.cadence: candidate-pool.json rank 2 cadence descriptor (transcribed authored input)

history_years.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: CO-OPS Metadata API established/period fields; YEAR_MS=365.25d conservative for >=3y (UD-1)

span.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: station period of record

n_observations.compatibility_ref: DR-7: data API is date-range-capped and counting would page VALUES (forbidden, FR-B2); no aggregate count surface documented; class (ii) empty -> class 3 (UD-1)

authored_inputs.exogeneity_judgment: Buoy significant wave height is a physical oceanographic measurement exogenous to any market or betting signal.

authored_sources.authority_published: NOAA NDBC is a federal scientific authority (candidate-pool rank 3)
authored_sources.machine_readable: NDBC station table is machine-parseable text; metadata-surface machine-readability to CONFIRM at Gate-A fixture time (research SS4)
authored_sources.cadence: candidate-pool.json rank 3 cadence descriptor (transcribed authored input)

history_years.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: NDBC station/deployment metadata period of record (CONFIRM metadata-surface machine-readability at Gate A); YEAR_MS=365.25d conservative (UD-1)

span.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: deployment period of record

n_observations.compatibility_ref: DR-7: flat-file provider; counting = downloading observation files (= VALUES, forbidden FR-B2); class (ii) empty -> class 3 (UD-1)

authored_inputs.exogeneity_judgment: Station temperature/wind observations are physical meteorological measurements exogenous to any market or betting signal.

authored_sources.authority_published: NWS/ISD (NOAA NCEI) is a federal scientific authority (candidate-pool rank 4)
authored_sources.machine_readable: ISD station inventory is a machine-readable CSV with period-of-record BEGIN/END columns (routes.js nws-isd-station-inventory)
authored_sources.cadence: candidate-pool.json rank 4 cadence descriptor (transcribed authored input)

history_years.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: ISD isd-history.csv BEGIN/END period-of-record columns; YEAR_MS=365.25d conservative for >=3y (UD-1)

n_observations.compatibility_ref: DR-7: flat-file provider; counting = downloading observation files (= VALUES, forbidden FR-B2); class (ii) empty -> class 3 (UD-1)

authored_inputs.exogeneity_judgment: OPERATOR DECISION REQUIRED (DR-8 substantive authored call): candidate-pool endogeneity_flag:true flags mild reflexivity of electricity demand with market/price signals (arch SS9:260). Default proposed reading: NON-exogenous (exogenous:false) — the conservative honest reading of the flag; if the operator authors exogenous:false, EIA fails gate 2 and is ineligible in every completion (DR-7 Tier-2), making its n-classification outcome-irrelevant.

authored_sources.authority_published: EIA is a federal statistical authority (candidate-pool rank 5)
authored_sources.free: EIA v2 API is free but requires a personally-obtained API key (UD-2, NFR-SEC)
authored_sources.cadence: candidate-pool.json rank 5 cadence descriptor (transcribed authored input)
authored_sources.exogeneity_judgment: candidate-pool.json rank 5 endogeneity_flag:true + endogeneity_note (arch SS9:260) — the DR-8 substantive authored call, surfaced for the operator at Gate A

history_years.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: EIA series metadata start/end period; YEAR_MS=365.25d conservative for >=3y (UD-1)

span.compatibility_ref: DR-7 documented-equivalence: series metadata start/end period

n_observations.compatibility_ref: DR-7: the SOLE class-(i)-attempt candidate — EIA v2 data envelope reports response.total (exact row count) requested with length=0; contingent on UD-2 credential + empirical zero-row behavior. A rows-despite-length=0 outcome is a class-4 CONTAMINATION event (G2 value-bearing), never an n-classification fallback and never class 3.
